title: Manchester, NH — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Manchester, NH: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Manchester is a city in NH with a population of 115,644. No state income or sales tax, close to Boston, and four distinct New England seasons.

Last updated: July 08, 2026
